allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['survey','panas']}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'survey' in k.lower\(\) or 'pana' in k.lower\(\)}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('panas',{}\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(k for k in deps if 'router' in k.lower\(\) or 'wouter' in k.lower\(\)\)\)")
